description_long: This is a rich chocolate muffin topped with a generous swirl of chocolate frosting. The frosting is adorned with three large, pillowy white marshmallows, drizzled with dark chocolate and sprinkled with chopped nuts. The muffin itself has a moist, dense texture with a slightly cracked top, suggesting a decadent, fudgy interior. The base is wrapped in a classic ridged paper liner, mostly white with some brown chocolate stains. The toppings are visually prominent, creating a contrast between the dark chocolate, white marshmallows, and light tan nuts. The overall appearance is indulgent and inviting, perfect for a dessert display in an urban café or bakery.
description: A chocolate muffin with chocolate frosting, topped with marshmallows, chocolate drizzle, and chopped nuts in a white paper wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chocolate frosting swirl, three marshmallows, chocolate drizzle, and visible chopped nuts on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the marshmallows and chocolate drizzle, with less visibility of the nuts and more focus on the frosting's swirl.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the chopped nuts and marshmallows, with the frosting and muffin texture clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the marshmallows and chocolate drizzle, with the muffin's paper wrapper and less visible nuts.
attribute_frosting_style: swirled chocolate buttercream with drizzled chocolate
attribute_wrapper_pattern: plain white with brown chocolate stains
